subject: Grimer, a sludge-pile Pokémon, oozing in an industrial or rocky environment
description: A large mound of dark purple oozing sludge forms the main figure against a grey industrial or rocky backdrop. The creature has a wide, toothy grin visible at the top of its amorphous mass, and its body drips and flows downward. The color palette is entirely purple and grey, consistent with the Kanto Grimer (not Alolan, which would show yellow-green toxin coloring). The environment appears to be a dark, wet industrial or cave-like setting with stone or concrete visible.
foreground: large purple sludge creature with wide grin
